description_long: This is a medium-sized bubble tea cup with a cylindrical orange-brown body and a wide, light blue rim. The cup features a domed, semi-transparent lid that allows a partial view of the drink's contents, including several dark tapioca pearls floating near the bottom. A straight, wide blue straw protrudes vertically through the center of the lid, designed for easy sipping of both liquid and pearls. The cup has a beige sleeve wrapped around its middle, likely for insulation and grip. The overall design is simple and unbranded, with no visible logos or text. The materials and proportions suggest it is a typical takeaway bubble tea cup found in urban environments.
description: A medium orange-brown bubble tea cup with a domed lid, blue straw, and beige sleeve, containing visible tapioca pearls. The design is simple and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue straw, domed lid, beige sleeve, and visible tapioca pearls inside the orange-brown cup.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the straw, domed lid, and sleeve, with the cup's cylindrical shape clearly visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with the straw and domed lid prominent and the sleeve wrapping around the cup.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the back of the cup, sleeve, and straw, with the domed lid and cup body still clearly visible.
attribute_straw_type: plastic, wide, straight, blue, no distinctive features
attribute_cup_lid_style: domed, semi-transparent plastic lid with a central straw slot
